### 🏛️ Feature Area & Scope
* **Proposed Case Study Name:** (e.g. *Education & Cognitive Transmission*, *Climate Simulation & Entropy*)
* **Primary Domain:** (Select: Finance / Religion / Law / Infrastructure / Energy / Education)

### 🧬 Isomorphism Description
Map the tension across the layers of Aletheia:
* **The Sol (1st Hand):** (The raw biophysical reality / physical constraint / human gesture)
* **The Codex (2nd/3rd Hand):** (The legal, digital, or administrative abstraction that captures the Sol)
* **The Chimera (4th Hand):** (The systemic degradation or model collapse when the loop is closed without Sol grounding)

### 📚 References & Proofs of Friction
Please provide links to stable public records, DOIs, court transcripts, or biophysical measurements that ground this proposal.
